action.description:
Introduced by Representatives Miresse, Mursau, Stroud, Madison, Andraca, Arney, Brown, Anderson, Clancy, DeSmidt, Emerson, Fitzgerald, Hysell, Joers, Johnson, McCarville, Moore Omokunde, Neubauer, Ortiz-Velez, Palmeri, Roe, Sheehan, Sinicki, Stubbs, Taylor, Tenorio and Udell; 
cosponsored by Senators Habush Sinykin, Dassler-Alfheim, Drake, Hesselbein, Larson, Ratcliff, Roys, Spreitzer and Wall
